# SEO Deliverables Contract

## 1. Metadata Definitions
Guidelines for page headers, descriptions, dynamic tags, and social share metadata.
- Title tag rules.
- Meta description length and formatting constraints.
- Open Graph (OG) tags for social media representation.

## 2. Structured Data Schemas
Integrate JSON-LD schemas to improve page visibility in search results.
- Product schema rules.
- Organization and FAQ page schemas.
- Verification and debugging procedures.

## 3. Site Speed Indicators
Perform optimizations to hit target metrics for Core Web Vitals.
- Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) targets.
- First Input Delay (FID) or Interaction to Next Paint (INP) targets.
- Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) thresholds.

## 4. Crawlability Checklist
Ensure search engine indexers can discover, crawl, and render the pages.
- [ ] robots.txt paths validation.
- [ ] XML sitemap dynamic generation.
- [ ] Canonical URLs and redirect paths verification.

## 5. Deployment and Branch Integration
Control search optimization deployment.
- Branching Model: Git Flow (features tested on feature/* before moving to develop and release/*).
- Commit Strategy: Enforce Conventional Commits patterns (e.g., feat(seo): optimize metadata definitions for resource pages).
